creator: matteo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Actually, it seems that the namespace collision warning also happens with a pf.conf that does not use anchors and contains

table <bruteforce> persist

block log quick from <bruteforce>

pass in proto tcp from any to ($interface)
  port ${tcp_services} keep state \
  (max-src-conn 10, max-src-conn-rate 1/4, \
  overload <bruteforce> flush global)


This set of rules is inspired by the very similar one from https://www.openbsd.org/faq/pf/filter.html#stateopts, thus one would expect it to work.
